title: Radars in Brasília-DF and people in Goiânia-GO reported UFOs [1984]
excerpt: October 13, 1984. Time: 00:21Z. Duration: 12 minutes. Three control centers and one aircraft came into contact to confirm the sighting of an unidentified flying object between Goiânia and Anápolis, both in the state of Goiás. ACC-BS: It is the Center. text_preview:
October 13, 1984. Time: 00:21Z. Duration: 12 minutes. Three control centers and one aircraft came into contact to confirm the sighting of an unidentified flying object between Goiânia and Anápolis, both in the state of Goiás.

- ACC-BS: It is the Center.

- APP-GO: Ah, good night Goiânia listening.

- ACC-BS: What?

- APP-GO: Ah, good night it is Goiânia. Are you observing something on the radar, something between Goiânia and Anápolis by any chance?

- ACC-BS: Wait a little bit.

- ACC-BS: What is the position more or less?

- APP-GO: Between Goiânia and Anápolis, more or less.

- ACC-BS: Righ
summary: On Oct 13, 1984, Brasília ACC detected a brief radar plot between Goiânia and Anápolis after the Goiânia APP relayed a civilian report of a high-speed flying saucer passing over the runway.
